## Meeting Purpose

[Screening interview for the Engagement Manager role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Candidate Profile:** Daniela Conde, an Account Director at Monks with 8 years of agency experience managing social media for major brands (e.g., Warner Bros., Spotify).](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**Role Mismatch:** The candidate's background is in social media, while the role requires experience in organic SEO content.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [**Relevant Experience:** Daniela's experience scaling the Warner Bros. account from 9 to 12 brands and 23 to 40 people demonstrates strong account growth capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**Process Alignment:** The candidate's client management process (proactive communication, frequent status calls) aligns with GrowthX's coordination-heavy model.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

## Topics

### The Engagement Manager Role at GrowthX

  - [**Function:** Pure account management; no editorial work.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [**Core Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [Own client relationships, renewals, and account health.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [Track performance against goals and guide strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [Coordinate with internal teams (Managing Editors, Directors).](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [**Team Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [**Engagement Manager (EM):** Manages 3 Managing Editors (MEs).](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [**Managing Editor (ME):** Manages 2–3 accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [**Directors:** A pooled resource for strategic support (e.g., SEO analysis), engaged via a ticket system.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [**Account Load:**](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [**Current:** 8 accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [**Projected:** Scale to 12 accounts by Q2 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [**Daily Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [Weekly/bi-weekly client calls.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [Daily internal coordination (Slack, Monday.com).](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Proactive performance monitoring; escalate issues to Directors as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

### Candidate Background & Experience

  - [**Current Role:** Account Director at Monks (8 years).](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**Client Experience:** Spotify, Uber, Sanofi, Warner Bros. Discovery, Marriott.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Primary Focus:** Social media content (organic, campaigns, influencer).](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [**Warner Bros. Account Growth:**](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [Scaled the team from 23 to 40 people.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [Grew the account from 9 to 12 brands across Latam.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [Secured an 18-month contract renewal by identifying and addressing client needs.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**Spotify Campaign Example:**](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [Led a large-scale, cross-functional campaign (Strategy, Creative, Data, UX, Dev).](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [Built an in-app experience that scaled from Latam to the US, Spain, and Asia.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)

### Process & Problem-Solving

  - [**Work Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Weekly client touchpoints.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Daily internal status reviews with Project Managers.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Proactive reminders (Slack) and task management (Monday.com).](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [**Problem-Solving Example (Spotify Campaign):**](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [**Problem:** Missed deadlines due to client delays in providing information and approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [**Action:** Proactively flagged risks in writing. When delays persisted, increased status calls from once to twice weekly to accelerate approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [**Result:** The campaign launched successfully on time.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:** Evaluate candidate fit, considering the social media background versus the SEO-focused role.](https://fathom.video/share/yZGtCDA3y8raEWsHx_ZpSJrxSjccExCP?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
